Luxury Culture

Desert Design Week

Marrakech • 5 days • March 27, 2026

A high-end city and desert pairing for travelers who want architecture, gastronomy, and golden-hour visuals.

Best for

Travelers who care about aesthetics, memorable stays, and a balance between immersive culture and visual luxury.

Highlights

  • Rooftop dinners with skyline views.
  • Design-led riads and boutique hotels.
  • A desert overnight with photography-friendly scenery.

Content note

To create another entry like this, duplicate this file, update the frontmatter, and replace the body copy. Astro will generate the route automatically.
